records.m_Talk_ENG: Platform 3, Exploration Team Hanged Man Alpha, awaiting descent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Platform 3, Exploration Team Hanged Man Alpha, awaiting descent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Platform 3, Exploration Team Hanged Man Alpha, awaiting descent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Didn't think Sirasaki would have this elevator up and running again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Didn't think Sirasaki would have this elevator up and running again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Didn't think Sirasaki would have this elevator up and running again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Given the tight security we saw on the way here, it doesn't seem like they're opening it for anyone.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Given the tight security we saw on the way here, it doesn't seem like they're opening it for anyone.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Given the tight security we saw on the way here, it doesn't seem like they're opening it for anyone.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've been on many missions finding data or Artifacts, but this is my first time getting a request to find a person.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've been on many missions finding data or Artifacts, but this is my first time getting a request to find a person.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've been on many missions finding data or Artifacts, but this is my first time getting a request to find a person.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's like we're bounty hunting. Sounds fun.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's like we're bounty hunting. Sounds fun.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's like we're bounty hunting. Sounds fun.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Everyone, check your Eternium shields. Considering the variability of the environment, we aim to return within 48 hours at most.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Everyone, check your Eternium shields. Considering the variability of the environment, we aim to return within 48 hours at most.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Everyone, check your Eternium shields. Considering the variability of the environment, we aim to return within 48 hours at most.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Check complete. All green.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Check complete. All green.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Check complete. All green.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Umm, is that girl really not going to wear a suit?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Umm, is that girl really not going to wear a suit?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Umm, is that girl really not going to wear a suit?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, I like pretty clothes, you see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, I like pretty clothes, you see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, I like pretty clothes, you see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We're not going to a theme park. Even if you're a Counter, it's better to have at least some protective gear.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We're not going to a theme park. Even if you're a Counter, it's better to have at least some protective gear.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We're not going to a theme park. Even if you're a Counter, it's better to have at least some protective gear.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She says it's fine. Leave her be.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She says it's fine. Leave her be.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She says it's fine. Leave her be.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Look at our gloomy little group. At least she's brightening up the atmosphere a bit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Look at our gloomy little group. At least she's brightening up the atmosphere a bit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Look at our gloomy little group. At least she's brightening up the atmosphere a bit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Main rope deployment and coordinate stabilizer activated. Lift drop preparation complete.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Main rope deployment and coordinate stabilizer activated. Lift drop preparation complete.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Main rope deployment and coordinate stabilizer activated. Lift drop preparation complete.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Descend.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Descend.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Descend.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice depths. 5th floor.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice depths. 5th floor.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Chamber's Grand Dimension Crevice depths. 5th floor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Basepoint secured.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Basepoint secured.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Basepoint secured.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Nothing out of the ordinary yet.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Nothing out of the ordinary yet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Nothing out of the ordinary yet.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Some equipment is fried. Including the comms. They couldn't withstand the dive strains.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Some equipment is fried. Including the comms. They couldn't withstand the dive strains.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Some equipment is fried. Including the comms. They couldn't withstand the dive strains.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most commercial equipment isn't sturdy enough to withstand the environment down here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most commercial equipment isn't sturdy enough to withstand the environment down here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most commercial equipment isn't sturdy enough to withstand the environment down here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fortunately, the essentials are good. There shouldn't be any major issues with the operation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fortunately, the essentials are good. There shouldn't be any major issues with the operation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fortunately, the essentials are good. There shouldn't be any major issues with the operation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hicks isn't back yet?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hicks isn't back yet?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hicks isn't back yet?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We told her to return within 20 minutes during the briefing. But she's already off doing her own thing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We told her to return within 20 minutes during the briefing. But she's already off doing her own thing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We told her to return within 20 minutes during the briefing. But she's already off doing her own thing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hope the C.O.s didn't get to her already. That would be a shame.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hope the C.O.s didn't get to her already. That would be a shame.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hope the C.O.s didn't get to her already. That would be a shame.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hicks's tag has been stationary in one spot for a while.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hicks's tag has been stationary in one spot for a while.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hicks's tag has been stationary in one spot for a while.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's likely that something happened, and she's unlikely to be aware that our comms are down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's likely that something happened, and she's unlikely to be aware that our comms are down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's likely that something happened, and she's unlikely to be aware that our comms are down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll move to her coordinates while putting down the guiding lights.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll move to her coordinates while putting down the guiding lights.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll move to her coordinates while putting down the guiding lights.
